taxonomy: Hederella quintuplinervis belongs to the phylum Rotifera, which is a group of microscopic, aquatic animals. It further falls under the class Monogononta, characterized by having a single gonopore. Within the class Monogononta, Hederella quintuplinervis is classified as a member of the order Flosculariidae. This order consists of rotifers with a distinctive stalked crown of cilia. The exact classification of Hederella quintuplinervis is still a subject of ongoing research.
